steps.title: Match against the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: 4t^4 + 4t^3 - 9t^2 + 3t - 12 has an extra -12 constant. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: 4t^4 + 4t^3 - 9t^2 + 3t matches exactly. Works.
  • Choice C: 4t^4 + t^3 + 9t - 12 has wrong t^3, t^2, and constant terms. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: 4t^4 + t^3 + 3t has wrong t^3 coefficient and is missing -9t^2. Eliminated.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
